activities.name: DF load FACT_UTM_PARAMETERS_VALUE
activities.description: Loading Fact_UTM_Parameters_Value from ODS to STAGE

scripts.text:
WITH M1 AS 
(
	SELECT * 
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT UTMID,InboundQueueID,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY InboundQueueID ORDER BY UTMID) AS RW 
		FROM EDW.FACT_UTM_PARAMETERS_VALUE
		) M1
	WHERE RW > 1
	)
	

UPDATE EDW.FACT_UTM_PARAMETERS_VALUE
SET InboundQueueID = NULL
WHERE UTMID IN (SELECT UTMID FROM M1);



/*

WHERE InboundQueueID IN

SELECT 
    InboundQueueID
    FROM 
    (
	SELECT InboundQueueID,Count(1) AS CT FROM EDW.FACT_UTM_PARAMETERS_VALUE
	GROUP  BY InboundQueueID
	HAVING Count(1)>1
        ) A1
	
    ) 
AND InboundQueueID IS NOT NULL
AND InboundQueueID!='';

activities.name: Unit CPL update for BP
activities.description: Updating the Unit CPL for BP source group since Guru spend is configured from Funnel. AP estimated CPL will be removed. Meanwhile updating the CPL to 0 by this script

scripts.text:
Update U Set UnitCpl=0 
from EDW.FACT_UTM_Parameters_value U 
join EDW.Fact_lead L on U.LeadId=L.LeadId
where L.LeadsubsourceId in (
'FHI-1549',
'PBC-951',
'CTA-709',
'SWR-3819',
'MAC-4766',--New srs Ids below
'CTA-789',
'CTA-790',
'FHI-6767',
'MAC-5575',
'PBC-1221',
'PBC-1222',
'SWR-4084',
'RTW-1970',--Old
'RTW-8455'--New
);
